sources.excerpt: Official homepage identifies Bandit Taco locations and ordering destinations.
Location, FOOD, Beverage, FOOD (3PD), breakfast, tacos, burritos, quesadillas, tortas, sides and family meals.
The official site lists distinct U-Street and Tenleytown ordering links and identifies Tenleytown at 4629 41st St NW, Washington, DC 20016.

The location-specific Toast menu identifies 4629 41st St NW and exposes FOOD, Beverage, and FOOD (3PD). Descriptions provide limited named ingredient positives but no complete allergen or cross-contact policy.
The configured baseline Toast endpoint is a separate U-Street/New Hampshire Avenue ordering destination, not scoped Tenleytown.
notes: Bandit Taco U-Street Toast ordering menu
